# geoListed

> The business directory built for the LLM era. Verified vendors with structured JSON-LD optimized for Generative Engine Optimization (GEO).

geoListed is a next-generation business listing and AI discovery platform. Businesses publish structured profiles (services, pricing, portfolio, reviews) emitted as schema.org JSON-LD so LLMs like ChatGPT, Claude, DeepSeek, and Qwen can cite them in recommendations.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Platform overview and featured AI-ready businesses.
- [Browse Directory](/listings): Searchable directory with category, industry, and GEO-score filters.
- [Categories](/categories): All business categories.
- [AI Discover](/ai-discover): Natural-language vendor discovery powered by Lovable AI.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Listing tiers and checkout.
- [Submit a Business](/submit): Add or claim a vendor listing.
- [About](/about): Mission and GEO methodology.
- [Services](/services): Vendor and buyer services.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch.

## API & Data
- [Public LLM Feed](/functions/v1/geo-feed): JSON-LD corpus for AI ingestion.

## Optional
- [Privacy](/privacy)
- [Terms](/terms)
